sentences.arabic: تَتَقَلَّبُ أَحْوَالُ الإِنْسَانِ فِي هَذِهِ الدَّارِ بَيْنَ سَرَّاءَ تُبْهِجُ النَّفْسَ وَضَرَّاءَ تَمْتَحِنُ الصَّبْرَ.
sentences.translation: Stanja čovjeka na ovome svijetu smjenjuju se između blagodati koje raduju dušu i nedaća koje iskušavaju strpljenje.
sentences.translationEn: The conditions of man in this world alternate between moments of ease that delight the soul and hardships that test patience.

sentences.arabic: وَلَا يَجِدُ المَرْءُ مَلَاذاً آمِناً إِلَّا فِي رِحَابِ الإِيمَانِ بِالقَضَاءِ وَالقَدَرِ.
sentences.translation: Čovjek ne nalazi sigurno utočište osim u prostranstvima vjerovanja u Allahovo određenje (kada i kader).
sentences.translationEn: One finds no secure refuge except within the expanses of faith in divine decree and predestination.

sentences.arabic: لَقَدْ عَجِبَ الرَّسُولُ -صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ- مِنْ شَأْنِ المُؤْمِنِ فِي كُلِّ أَحْوالِهِ.
sentences.translation: Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, izrazio je divljenje stanju vjernika u svim njegovim okolnostima.
sentences.translationEn: The Messenger (peace be upon him) marveled at the affair of the believer in all his circumstances.

sentences.arabic: إِذْ إِنَّ أَمْرَهُ كُلَّهُ لَهُ خَيْرٌ فِي العَاجِلِ وَالآجِلِ.
sentences.translation: Zaista je svako njegovo stanje dobro za njega, bilo na ovom ili onom svijetu.
sentences.translationEn: Indeed, his entire affair is good for him, in this life and the hereafter.

sentences.arabic: وَبَيَّنَ -عَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ- أَنَّ هَذَا الفَضْلَ لَيْسَ لِأَحَدٍ إِلَّا لِلْمُؤْمِنِ خَاصَّةً.
sentences.translation: Objasnio je da ta odlika ne pripada nikome osim isključivo vjerniku.
sentences.translationEn: He explained that this privilege belongs to no one except the believer specifically.

sentences.arabic: فَإِنْ أَصَابَتْهُ نِعْمَةٌ أَوْ فَرَحٌ شَكَرَ اللهَ فَكَانَ خَيْراً لَهُ فِي دِينِهِ.
sentences.translation: Ako ga zadesi blagodat ili radost, on zahvali Allahu, pa to bude dobro po njegovu vjeru.
sentences.translationEn: If a blessing or joy reaches him, he thanks Allah, and it is good for him in his religion.

sentences.arabic: وَإِنْ أَصَابَتْهُ مِحْنَةٌ أَوْ ضِيقٌ صَبَرَ فَكَانَ خَيْراً لَهُ وَرِفْعَةً [أَخْرَجَهُ مُسْلِمٌ فِي كِتَابِ الزُّهْدِ وَالرَّقَائِقِ، رَقْمُ ٢٩٩٩].
sentences.translation: A ako ga zadesi iskušenje ili tjeskoba, on se strpi, pa mu to donese dobro i ugled [Muslim, Knjiga o zuhdu i suptilnostima, br. 2999].
sentences.translationEn: And if an ordeal or distress reaches him, he is patient, and it is good and an elevation for him [Reported by Muslim in the Book of Asceticism and Heart-Softeners, No. 2999].

sentences.arabic: وَيُوضِحُ الشَّيْخُ ابْنُ عُثَيْمِينَ -رَحِمَهُ اللهُ- أَنَّ هَذِهِ الخُصُوصِيَّةَ تَنْبُعُ مِنْ كَمَالِ التَّسْلِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Šejh Ibn Uthaymeen pojašnjava da ova specifičnost proizlazi iz potpune predanosti Allahu.
sentences.translationEn: Sheikh Ibn Uthaymeen clarifies that this uniqueness stems from perfect submission.

sentences.arabic: حَيْثُ يَعْلَمُ المُؤْمِنُ أَنَّ مَا أَصَابَهُ لَمْ يَكُنْ لِيُخْطِئَهُ أَبَداً.
sentences.translation: Vjernik zna da ga ono što ga je zadesilo nije moglo zaobići.
sentences.translationEn: The believer knows that what befell him was never meant to miss him.

sentences.arabic: وَمَا أَخْطَأَهُ مِنَ المَتَاعِ لَمْ يَكُنْ لِيُصِيبَهُ بِحَالٍ.
sentences.translation: Također, ono što ga je od dunjalučkih užitaka zaobišlo, nije ga moglo zadesiti.
sentences.translationEn: Likewise, whatever worldly enjoyment missed him was never meant to strike him.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الشُّكْرَ عِنْدَ الرَّخَاءِ يَعْنِي اسْتِعْمَالَ النِّعَمِ فِي طَاعَةِ المُنْعِمِ.
sentences.translation: Zahvalnost u blagostanju znači korištenje blagodati u pokornosti Onome ko ih daruje.
sentences.translationEn: Gratitude during prosperity means using blessings in obedience to the Bestower.

sentences.arabic: بَيْنَمَا الصَّبْرُ عِنْدَ البَلَاءِ يَعْنِي كَفَّ النَّفْسِ عَنِ التَّسَخُّطِ المَذْمُومِ.
sentences.translation: S druge strane, strpljenje u iskušenju znači suzdržavanje duše od pokuđenog negodovanja.
sentences.translationEn: Meanwhile, patience during affliction means restraining the soul from blameworthy discontent.

sentences.arabic: وَكَذَلِكَ حِفْظُ اللِّسَانِ عَنِ الشَّكْوَى لِغَيْرِ اللهِ تَعَالَى.
sentences.translation: To također podrazumijeva čuvanje jezika od žaljenja bilo kome osim Uzvišenom Allahu.
sentences.translationEn: It also means guarding the tongue from complaining to anyone other than Allah the Almighty.

sentences.arabic: فَالإِيمَانُ الحَقُّ يَصْنَعُ نَفْسِيَّةً صَلْبَةً لَا تُحَطِّمُهَا المَصَائِبُ العَاتِيَةُ.
sentences.translation: Istinski iman gradi snažnu psihu koju ne lome silne nedaće.
sentences.translationEn: True faith builds a resilient psyche that is not shattered by fierce calamities.

sentences.arabic: وَلَا تُطْغِيهَا المَكَاسِبُ الدُّنْيَوِيَّةُ الزَّائِلَةُ عَنِ الجَادَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Niti je prolazni dunjalučki dobici odvode s pravog puta u oholost.
sentences.translationEn: Nor is it led astray from the path by fleeting worldly gains.

sentences.arabic: بَلْ تَبْقَى النَّفْسُ مُتَّزِنَةً رَاضِيَةً بِمَا قَسَمَهُ اللهُ لَهَا مِنَ الرِّزْقِ.
sentences.translation: Naprotiv, duša ostaje uravnotežena i zadovoljna onim što joj je Allah dodijelio od opskrbe.
sentences.translationEn: Rather, the soul remains balanced and satisfied with the provision Allah has apportioned for it.

sentences.arabic: وَمِنْ هُنَا، يَتَبَيَّنُ أَنَّ الحَيَاةَ الطَّيِّبَةَ لَيْسَتْ فِي خُلُوِّهَا مِنَ المَشَقَّاتِ.
sentences.translation: Iz ovoga se vidi da se ugodan život ne ogleda u odsustvu poteškoća.
sentences.translationEn: From this, it becomes clear that a good life does not consist of the absence of hardships.

sentences.arabic: بَلْ تَكْمُنُ فِي كَيْفِيَّةِ التَّعَامُلِ مَعَ هَذِهِ المَشَقَّاتِ بِيَقِينٍ ثَابِتٍ.
sentences.translation: On se krije u načinu ophođenja prema tim poteškoćama uz čvrsto uvjerenje.
sentences.translationEn: Rather, it lies in how one deals with these hardships with firm certainty.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ هَذَا التَّوَازُنَ بَيْنَ الشُّكْرِ وَالصَّبْرِ هُوَ جَوْهَرُ العُبُودِيَّةِ الحَقَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ova ravnoteža između zahvalnosti i strpljenja je suština istinskog robovanja Allahu.
sentences.translationEn: This balance between gratitude and patience is the essence of true servitude.

sentences.arabic: فَلْيَحْرِصِ المُسْلِمُ عَلَى تَرْبِيَةِ قَلْبِهِ لِيَجْنِيَ ثِمَارَ السَّكِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Neka se musliman trudi da odgoji svoje srce kako bi brao plodove smiraja.
sentences.translationEn: Let the Muslim be keen on cultivating his heart to reap the fruits of tranquility.
